canonical_definition: An image classification benchmark used to evaluate automated accuracy prediction across shifted test sets.
papers: Repeated Random Sampling for Minimizing the Time-to-Accuracy of Learning

definitions.text: An image classification benchmark used to evaluate automated accuracy prediction across shifted test sets.
A smaller version of the ImageNet dataset used for faster experimentation, particularly for computationally intensive methods like dataset distillation.
